name: Bitaxe Sentry
description: Bitaxe stats and alerts, all in one
compose:
name: slashnode-bitaxe-sentry
services:
  sentry:
    image: zachprice105/bitaxe-sentry:v0.6.1
    container_name: bitaxe-sentry-sentry
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DB_PATH: /var/lib/bitaxe/bitaxe_sentry.db
      DB_DATA_DIR: /var/lib/bitaxe
    volumes:
      - sentry_data-sentry:/var/lib/bitaxe
  web:
    image: zachprice105/bitaxe-sentry:v0.6.1
    container_name: bitaxe-sentry-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: uvicorn bitaxe_sentry.sentry.webapp:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 7070
    depends_on:
      - sentry
    environment:
      DB_PATH: /var/lib/bitaxe/bitaxe_sentry.db
      DB_DATA_DIR: /var/lib/bitaxe
    volumes:
      - sentry_data-sentry:/var/lib/bitaxe
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7070:7070
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  sentry_data-sentry:
    name: slashnode-bitaxe-sentry_sentry_data-sentry
  web_data-sentry:
    name: slashnode-bitaxe-sentry_web_data-sentry
